word: H3071 - יְהֹוָה נִסִּי - Yᵉhôvâh niççîy - yeh-ho-vaw' nis-see' - Jehovah-nissi

sections.paragraph:
Original: יהוה נסּי

Transliteration: yehôvâh nissı̂y

Phonetic: yeh-ho-vaw' nis-see'

BDB Definition:

Jehovah-nissi = "Jehovah is my banner"
  1. the name given by Moses to the altar which he built in commemoration of the discomfiture of the Amalekites

Origin: from H3068 and H5251 with the prononimal suffix

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
